name: 4'x5'6" Rainbow Kids' Rug - Pillowfort™: Multicolored Cotton Tufted Medium Pile, Machine Washable
description: Give your child's room a playful and vibrant feel with this Rainbow Rug from Pillowfort™. Made from 100% cotton and featuring a tufted design with a medium pile height, this printed area rug feels soft and cozy underfoot. Plus, you can toss it in the washing machine for easy cleanup whenever needed. Showcasing a rainbow print, this indoor rug is sure to add sweet flair to their space.
